takeaways: Market declined (Nifty -2.60%). Look for opportunities in quality stocks with strong fundamentals — dips are for accumulating, not panicking.
Sector rotation: Pharma leads (-2.3% month), Realty lags (-19.0%). Consider tilting new allocation toward sectors with strong momentum.
28 watchlist stocks show accumulate signals: APOLLOHOSP, RATEGAIN, SBIN, RELIANCE, SAFARI. Build positions in 2-3 tranches; max 6% per name.
2 watchlist stocks on wait: ABB, CHOLAFIN. Avoid catching falling knives — wait for trend reversal confirmation.
Macro watch: Crude at $89.56, USD/INR at 93.2. Rising crude or weakening INR can pressure IT/pharma margins short-term but often creates accumulation opportunities in exporters.
Position sizing: Max 6% in any single name. Multi-year horizon — don't chase momentum; buy quality on weakness. Tax-efficient if held > 1 year.
